creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
kientzle    2008-08-17 19:43:45 UTC

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:
    usr.bin/tar          matching.c 
  Log:
  SVN rev 181801 on 2008-08-17 19:43:45Z by kientzle
  
  Don't strip a leading '/' from a pattern to be matched.
  This aligns the pattern-matching behavior with GNU tar
  and restores the behavior of bsdtar prior to FreeBSD 6.3.
  
  PR:             bin/117909
  MFC after:      3 days
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.14      +0 -2      src/usr.bin/tar/matching.c
